name: Chicken & Sausage Gumbo (Crockpot)
recipeIngredient: 12 ounces Fully cooked smoked sausage, links, sliced and/or quartered
2 cups Sliced okra OR one 10-ounce package frozen whole okra, sliced, 1/2 inch thick
recipeInstructions:
1. For the roux: In a heavy 2-quart saucepan, stir together flour and oil until smooth. Cook over medium-high heat for 5 minutes, stirring constantly.
2. Reduce heat to medium. Cook and stir continuously for about 15 more minutes, or until a dark, reddish brown roux forms. Allow it to cool.
3. In the crockpot, combine water. Stir in the cooled roux.
4. Add sausage, chicken, okra, onion, green pepper, celery, garlic, salt, pepper, and ground red pepper. Cover.
5. Cook on low-heat setting for 10-12 hours or on high-heat setting for 4½ to 5 hours.
6. Skim off any excess fat before serving over rice. Makes 6 servings.
